decisions.kill_condition: A prior source already defines and empirically validates the same four-part fractional attribution under materially equivalent estimands.
Prior work performs materially equivalent real-skin-spectrum camera-operator observability and metamer enumeration.
Prior work estimates the same recoverable-versus-unrecoverable boundary across calibrated spectra and uncontrolled images.
Prior work performs the same three-component quantitative decomposition with external pathology-confirmed validation.
Prior work already establishes the same subject-balanced, body-site-conditioned representation and its downstream measurement consequences.
Prior work implements a materially equivalent governed cross-domain evidence chain with explicit asset-role limits.
